title: Config 7: sgd width=384 depth=2 batch=64 aug=affine
methodology: Generated a 2-hidden-layer MLP with width 384, batch size 64, sgd at lr=0.0003, dropout=0.2, weight_decay=0.0005, augmentation=affine, and label_smoothing=0.1.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
